# Hi, I'm Raj 👋

**Himanshu Raj** — indie developer · GitHub: **1tsRajuWu** / **1tsRaj**

## What I build

### [Smiley](https://github.com/1tsRajuWu/Smiley) — Discord Rich Presence with anime GIFs

A free desktop app for **Windows**, **macOS**, and **Linux** that sets your Discord status with **animated anime GIFs**. Pick gaming, coding, eating, chilling — no Developer Portal setup.

- ⬇️ [**Download latest release**](https://github.com/1tsRajuWu/Smiley/releases/latest)
- 📖 [About Smiley & me](https://github.com/1tsRajuWu/Smiley/blob/main/docs/ABOUT.md)
- 🐛 [Report a bug](https://github.com/1tsRajuWu/Smiley/issues)
- 💝 [Support on PayPal](https://paypal.me/1tsRaj)

```
Pick activity → anime GIF on your Discord profile → done.
```

Also: [**Smiley.Native**](https://github.com/1tsRajuWu/Smiley/blob/main/README-NATIVE.md) — lightweight version (~25 MB RAM, no Electron).
